summary: This week, Anthropic offered a sneak peek into future innovations with the 'Mythos Preview' and provided essential guidance on managing Claude usage limits.

items.title: Usage limit best practices
items.summary: Understanding Claude's usage limits is crucial for planning your projects and ensuring uninterrupted access to the AI. This resource helps builders optimize their interactions and manage their usage effectively.

items.title: Mythos Preview (Glasswing)
items.summary: Anthropic's 'Mythos Preview' (Glasswing) offers a glimpse into future capabilities or research. Builders should keep an eye on this space for potential new tools or approaches that could enhance their Claude-powered applications.
